title: Connecticut General Statutes § 14-281d — Duties of operators of student transportation vehicles re receipt or discharge of school children
text: No operator of a student transportation vehicle, as defined in section 14-212, while engaged in the transportation of school children to and from school or school activities may receive or discharge any child in a location where such child may cross any highway to board the vehicle or to reach his residence or other destination, except as approved by the Commissioner of Education.
